# CTSubscriberInfo

**Class**

An object that provides an array of cellular network subscribers.

## Declaration

```swift
class CTSubscriberInfo
```

## Overview

Use the [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTSubscriber] instances provided by this class to identify individual subscribers by their [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTSubscriber/carrierToken] or [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTSubscriber/identifier] properties.

## Getting Subscriber Information

- **subscribers()**: Returns the cellular network subscribers.
- **subscriber()**: Returns the cellular network subscribers.

## Subscriber information

- **CTSubscriber**: A cellular network subscriber.
- **CTSubscriberDelegate**: A protocol to handle changes to subscriber information.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
